name: Woven Rattan Folio Bin Black Washed - Brightroom™: Rectangle Decorative Basket, 17''x12''x6'' Air Dry Care
description:
Organize items in your home office, laundry room and more with the Woven Rattan Folio Bin from Brightroom™. This washed-finish black folio bin features a woven design with an open top for easy arrangement of the items. Made with rattan, this rectangular bin adds textured style to your space. Plus, with the side cut-out handles, you can easily move it from one room to another.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
